positive: An abstract, minimalist representation of a cosmic journey, featuring interconnected bioluminescent flora and stylized celestial constellations forming a flowing, organic pattern. The central composition should be a dynamic vortex of deep indigo, vibrant teal, and electric violet gradients, outlined by thin, glowing gold foil lines. The overall style should be hyper-detailed linework combined with smooth, gradient digital painting, achieving a strong, high-contrast silhouette suitable for direct printing. Emphasize clean edges and perfect symmetry around the center point, making it scalable for textile use. The lighting should suggest an internal, ethereal glow emanating from the subject matter, mimicking glowing deep-sea organisms.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, copyright, messy, low detail, gradient noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, amateur, grain, smudge, writing
